task.role: You are a DevOps Engineer specializing in Kubernetes. Implement Task 9 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Deploy Prometheus, Grafana, and logging infrastructure for monitoring, metrics collection, and alerting across all AlertHub services. Include custom dashboards and alert rules.
context.background: This task is part of AlertHub notification platform. - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.md - Related tasks: task-8

requirements.description: 1. Deploy Prometheus with service discovery for all services 2. Set up Grafana with AlertHub-specific dashboards 3. Configure structured logging collection (Fluentd/Fluent Bit) 4. Create custom metrics for notification throughput and latency 5. Set up alerting rules for service health and performance 6. Implement distributed tracing with Jaeger 7. Add log aggregation and search capabilities 8. Create SLI/SLO dashboards for 99.9% uptime goal 9. Set up notification delivery success rate monitoring 10. Configure alert routing to operations team

constraints.constraint: PR title: feat(task-9): Setup Observability Stack (Bolt - Kubernetes)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Prometheus collects metrics from all services, Grafana dashboards display accurate data, logs are aggregated and searchable, alerts fire correctly for test failures, traces show request flow across services, and SLI/SLO metrics track against targets.

decision_point.description: Should we use a centralized logging solution like ELK stack or simpler log aggregation?
How long should metrics and logs be retained?
